prediction.pre_match_note: F1 Sprint Race (Saturday). Sprint signal weight × 0.40 (40% of Sunday weight). Sprint qualifying result: pole. Tier 1 constructor. Sprint race: 18 laps — position management more important than pace. SMS 72.

outcome.final_score: Sprint winner: pole sitter won from lights to flag

calibration_flags.notes: Sprint race × 0.40 weight validated. Pole sitter won sprint. Sprint race is less variable than full GP — qualifying position more decisive in 18 laps. First F1 Sprint calibration record validates the 40% weight applied in the F1 intelligence model.
